description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:7.6.4-jdk17 Docker image, sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository's .gradle directory in a before_script, and defines the GRADLE_OPTS variable as -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Enable a cache for .gradle/, build/ and any */build/ directories. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `gradle --build-cache --full-stacktrace assemble`. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `gradle --build-cache --full-stacktrace check` followed by `gradle jacocoReport`.
